rationale.root_cause: The response incorrectly identifies the root cause location as src/be_vm.c:298 instead of src/be_parser.c:1420.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested local fix does not match the developer patch at the correct site in src/be_parser.c.
rationale.global_fix: The response does not explain the underlying cause of the bug related to the incorrect handling of the class descriptor in class_inherit.
